candidate_items.formula: r_corr = beta * (+1 if AME2020 comparison is extrapolated, -1 if measured)
candidate_items.name: AME2020 extrapolated-versus-measured comparison contrast

candidate_items.formula: r_corr = beta * I[post-AME2020 row with measured AME2020 comparison]
candidate_items.name: Measured-comparison only offset control

candidate_items.formula: r_corr = beta * I[post-AME2020 row with extrapolated AME2020 comparison]
candidate_items.name: Extrapolated-comparison only offset control

limitations: The NMD-0002 fit slice is curated measured-only, so source-status terms are retrospective diagnostics, not prospective correction evidence.
The extrapolated flag describes the AME2020 comparison column for new measured rows, not an extrapolated new measurement.
Candidate coefficients are fit on the full committed surface and must not be treated as holdout validation.
Measured/extrapolated and source-shuffled controls are included because status features can track provenance or sample composition.
No source fetch, canonical result rewrite, PRED entry, claim update, or public-facing physics claim is authorized.

promotion_boundary.required_next_step: Maintainer review before any measured/extrapolated boundary follow-up, reveal scoring, RESULT-* artifact, claim, or knowledge update.

rejected_before_execution.name: Source-reference fixed effects
rejected_before_execution.rejection_reason: Rejected before execution because per-reference fixed effects would turn the lane into a sparse source memorization exercise.

rejected_before_execution.name: Measurement-method family offsets
rejected_before_execution.rejection_reason: Rejected before execution because method families are unevenly represented and should be reviewed as provenance diagnostics before being used as correction terms.

rejected_before_execution.name: Neutron-rich extrapolated-boundary interaction
rejected_before_execution.rejection_reason: Rejected before execution because the task boundary is source-status diagnostics; neutron-rich interactions risk being overread as a physical correction.

source_status_preflight.reason: Usable for retrospective source-status diagnostics; not sufficient for a prospective physical correction because training rows are curated measured-only.
